---
title: "Tutoriais"
---

```{=html}
<style>
  /* ================================================================
     Forest Canopy Theme — Tutorial Grid (with image cards)
     Aligned with: LCZ4r landing page · custom-modern.css · style.css
     Tokens: #f8faf7 bg · #1a2e1a text · #10b981 primary · #0ea5e9 sky
  ================================================================ */

  @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Source+Serif+4:wght@400;600;700&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap');

  :root {
    --fc-bg-page:       #f8faf7;
    --fc-bg-card:       rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.90);
    --fc-bg-elevated:   #e6ede4;
    --fc-primary:       #10b981;
    --fc-primary-dark:  #059669;
    --fc-sky:           #0ea5e9;
    --fc-text-main:     #1a2e1a;
    --fc-text-body:     #4a6741;
    --fc-text-muted:    #8aaa82;
    --fc-border:        rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.18);
    --fc-border-hover:  rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.55);
    --fc-shadow:        0 4px 24px -4px rgba(16, 40, 16, 0.10);
    --fc-shadow-hover:  0 16px 48px -8px rgba(16, 40, 16, 0.20);
    --fc-radius:        16px;
    --fc-radius-sm:     8px;
    --fc-ease:          cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.8, 0.25, 1);
  }

  /* ── Grid layout ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .tutorial-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr));
    gap: 1.75rem;
    padding: 2rem 0;
    font-family: 'Inter', 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
  }

  /* ── Card base ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .tutorial-card {
    background: var(--fc-bg-card);
    backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    border-radius: var(--fc-radius);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    border: 1px solid var(--fc-border);
    box-shadow: var(--fc-shadow);
    transition: transform 0.32s var(--fc-ease),
                box-shadow 0.32s var(--fc-ease),
                border-color 0.32s var(--fc-ease);
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .tutorial-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-7px);
    box-shadow: var(--fc-shadow-hover);
    border-color: var(--fc-border-hover);
  }

  /* ── Card image ───────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .card-image-wrapper {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    padding-bottom: 52%;   /* ~16:8 aspect ratio — wide cinematic crop */
    overflow: hidden;
    background: var(--fc-bg-elevated);
  }

  .card-image-wrapper img {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0; left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    object-position: center top;
    transition: transform 0.45s var(--fc-ease);
    filter: saturate(0.92) brightness(0.97);
  }

  .tutorial-card:hover .card-image-wrapper img {
    transform: scale(1.05);
    filter: saturate(1.05) brightness(1.00);
  }

  /* Gradient overlay at bottom of image */
  .card-image-wrapper::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    height: 55%;
    background: linear-gradient(
      to top,
      rgba(248, 250, 247, 0.95) 0%,
      rgba(248, 250, 247, 0.40) 55%,
      transparent 100%
    );
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  /* Badge floated over the image */
  .card-image-badge {
    position: absolute;
    top: 12px;
    right: 14px;
    z-index: 2;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.88);
    backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
    color: var(--fc-primary-dark);
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.68rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.07em;
    padding: 4px 12px;
    border-radius: 100px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    border: 1px solid var(--fc-border);
  }

  /* ── Card body (text area) ────────────────────────────────────── */
  .card-body {
    padding: 1.5rem 1.75rem 1.75rem;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    flex-grow: 1;
  }

  /* ── Card header row (icon + badge) ──────────────────────────── */
  .card-header {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    margin-bottom: 0.9rem;
  }

  .card-icon {
    color: var(--fc-primary);
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e8f5e9 0%, #d1fae5 100%);
    padding: 8px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    border: 1px solid rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.20);
    transition: background 0.3s var(--fc-ease), transform 0.3s var(--fc-ease);
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  .tutorial-card:hover .card-icon {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #d1fae5 0%, #a7f3d0 100%);
    transform: scale(1.10) rotate(-5deg);
  }

  /* ── Card content ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .card-title {
    color: var(--fc-text-main);
    font-family: 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif;
    font-size: 1.2rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin: 0 0 0.55rem 0;
    line-height: 1.25;
  }

  .card-description {
    color: var(--fc-text-body);
    font-size: 0.90rem;
    line-height: 1.65;
    flex-grow: 1;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  }

  /* ── CTA button ───────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .card-cta-button {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--fc-primary) 0%, var(--fc-primary-dark) 100%);
    color: #ffffff !important;
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.875rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-align: center;
    text-decoration: none !important;
    padding: 11px 20px;
    border-radius: var(--fc-radius-sm);
    transition: filter 0.2s ease, transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease;
    align-self: flex-start;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.28);
    letter-spacing: 0.01em;
  }

  .card-cta-button:hover {
    filter: brightness(1.08);
    transform: translateX(4px);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 18px rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.40);
    text-decoration: none !important;
    color: #ffffff !important;
  }

  /* ── SVG icons ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .tutorial-card svg {
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  /* ── GitHub feedback button ───────────────────────────────────── */
  .github-feedback-btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--fc-primary) 0%, var(--fc-sky) 100%);
    color: #ffffff !important;
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    padding: 11px 22px;
    border-radius: var(--fc-radius-sm);
    border: none;
    cursor: pointer;
    text-decoration: none !important;
    transition: filter 0.2s ease, transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.28);
    letter-spacing: 0.01em;
  }

  .github-feedback-btn:hover {
    filter: brightness(1.08);
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.38);
    text-decoration: none !important;
    color: #ffffff !important;
  }

  /* ── Responsive ───────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  @media (max-width: 640px) {
    .tutorial-grid {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      gap: 1.25rem;
      padding: 1rem 0;
    }
    .card-body {
      padding: 1.25rem 1.4rem 1.5rem;
    }
    .card-title { font-size: 1.1rem; }
  }

  /* ── Reduced motion ───────────────────────────────────────────── */
  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .tutorial-card,
    .card-cta-button,
    .card-icon,
    .card-image-wrapper img,
    .github-feedback-btn { transition: none; }
  }

</style>

<div class="tutorial-grid">

  <!-- Card 1: Tutorial Introdutório -->
  <div class="tutorial-card">
    <div class="card-image-wrapper">
      <span class="card-image-badge">LCZ map</span>
      <img
        src="https://github.com/ByMaxAnjos/LCZ4r/raw/main/inst/figures/fig_general_1_1.png"
        alt="Mapa LCZ de São Paulo gerado com LCZ4r"
        loading="lazy"
        onerror="this.parentElement.style.display='none'">
    </div>
    <div class="card-body">
      <div class="card-header">
        <div class="card-icon">
          <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
            <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M13 10V3L4 14h7v7l9-11h-7z" />
          </svg>
        </div>
      </div>
      <h3 class="card-title">Getting started with General Functions</h3>
      <p class="card-description">General Functions facilitate the retrieval, analysis, and visualization of LCZ maps.</p>
      <a href="https://bymaxanjos.github.io/LCZ4r/en/articles/Introd_genera_LCZ4r.html" class="card-cta-button">
        Getting Started
        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" width="16" height="16">
          <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M17 8l4 4m0 0l-4 4m4-4H3" />
        </svg>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Card 2: RAPs -->
  <div class="tutorial-card">
    <div class="card-image-wrapper">
      <span class="card-image-badge">LCZ Generator</span>
      <img
        src="https://github.com/ByMaxAnjos/LCZ4r/raw/main/inst/figures/generator_card.png"
        alt="Análise de Ilha de Calor Urbana por estação do ano"
        loading="lazy"
        onerror="this.parentElement.style.display='none'">
    </div>
    <div class="card-body">
      <div class="card-header">
        <div class="card-icon">
          <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
            <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M4 7v10c0 2.21 3.58 4 8 4s8-1.79 8-4V7M4 7c0 2.21 3.58 4 8 4s8-1.79 8-4M4 7c0-2.21 3.58-4 8-4s8 1.79 8 4m0 5c0 2.21-3.58 4-8 4s-8-1.79-8-4" />
          </svg>
        </div>
      </div>
      <h3 class="card-title">Download LCZ map from LCZ Generator Platform.</h3>
      <p class="card-description">The LCZ Generator is a web application for creating Local Climate Zone (LCZ) maps. This guide provides step-by-step instructions to generate an LCZ map for your city using the LCZ4r package.</p>
      <a href="https://bymaxanjos.github.io/LCZ4r/en/articles/Introd_genera_LCZ4r.html#download-lcz-map-from-lcz-generator-platform"" class="card-cta-button">
        See Tutorial
        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" width="16" height="16">
          <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M17 8l4 4m0 0l-4 4m4-4H3" />
        </svg>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```


---

## 🌲 Tem feedback ou sugestões?

Você tem alguma ideia de melhoria ou encontrou algum erro? Adoraríamos ouvir você! Clique no botão abaixo para abrir uma nova *issue* no GitHub e compartilhar suas sugestões diretamente conosco.

```{=html}
<a href='https://github.com/ByMaxAnjos/climasus4r/issues/new' class="github-feedback-btn">
  <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor">
    <path d="M12 0C5.37 0 0 5.37 0 12c0 5.31 3.435 9.795 8.205 11.385.6.105.825-.255.825-.57 0-.285-.015-1.23-.015-2.235-3.015.555-3.795-.735-4.035-1.41-.135-.345-.72-1.41-1.23-1.695-.42-.225-1.02-.78-.015-.795.945-.015 1.62.87 1.845 1.23 1.08 1.815 2.805 1.305 3.495.99.105-.78.42-1.305.765-1.605-2.67-.3-5.46-1.335-5.46-5.925 0-1.305.465-2.385 1.23-3.225-.12-.3-.54-1.53.12-3.18 0 0 1.005-.315 3.3 1.23.96-.27 1.98-.405 3-.405s2.04.135 3 .405c2.295-1.56 3.3-1.23 3.3-1.23.66 1.65.24 2.88.12 3.18.765.84 1.23 1.905 1.23 3.225 0 4.605-2.805 5.625-5.475 5.925.435.375.81 1.095.81 2.22 0 1.605-.015 2.895-.015 3.3 0 .315.225.69.825.57A12.02 12.02 0 0 0 24 12c0-6.63-5.37-12-12-12z"/>
  </svg>
  Open  GitHub issue
</a>
```
